source_pr.title: executor: split big test file into smaller files.
source_pr.body: One big test file makes it hard to locate a specific test case.

symptoms: result = tk.MustQuery("select max(c) from t group by d having sum(c) > 3 order by avg(c) desc") (executor/aggregate_test.go)
failure_signature: result = tk.MustQuery("select max(c) from t group by d having sum(c) > 3 order by avg(c) desc") (executor/aggregate_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
